title: Packed tarball installs into a clean prefix
description: Release-only smoke that installs the packed tarball into a temporary prefix and runs the installed `orca` binary.
input: Pack the repo, install the tarball into a clean npm prefix, and verify the installed `orca` binary exposes the expected root help surface.
command: bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; TMP_ROOT=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf $TMP_ROOT" EXIT; npm pack --pack-destination "$TMP_ROOT" >/dev/null; TAR=$(ls "$TMP_ROOT"/*.tgz | head -n1); PREFIX="$TMP_ROOT/prefix"; npm install -g --prefix "$PREFIX" "$TAR" >/dev/null; "$PREFIX/bin/orca" --help'
